summary: Well‑mastered PCM soundboard recording from the tour, though reviewers give no details on the musical performance.
review: The tape was mastered by Dave Cramer and his team, who note that this show is one of the first PCM F‑1 recordings on the tour, suggesting a clean digital source. No reviewer comments address the band's playing, setlist, or specific song moments, leaving the musical quality unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one substantive review focuses on recording lineage and gives a high rating; no information on performance makes it hard to rate the show, so the overall score is moderate with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewed as an early PCM F‑1 digital tape mastered by Dave Cramer; no explicit comments on clarity or mix, but lineage suggests a high‑fidelity source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided in the reviews.
